reasoning: Query requested cherry blossom spots in Tohoku. Tool returned generic Akita spots (museum, toll booth, archaeological sites, shrines) with no sakura signal. Data is grounded but not ranked or filtered for the topic, leaving the agent to infer relevance.
missing_data: Sakura-tagged spots, bloom timing, hanami parks (e.g., Kakunodate, Hirosaki). No theme/category filter applied or available.
improvement_hint: Add theme/keyword filter (e.g., cherry_blossom) or surface description tags so agents can constrain by topic; broaden Tohoku coverage beyond single prefecture.

reasoning: User asked for sake breweries in Niigata. get_local_specialty returned MAFF GI items: chamame, snow-buried carrots, lotus root — no sake. Data is real and well-translated but completely off-topic for sake breweries, which are a different dataset.
missing_data: Sake brewery list (Niigata is famous for breweries: Asahi Shuzo, Hakkaisan, Kubota, etc.); GI sake (e.g., Niigata Sake) not surfaced.
improvement_hint: Route sake brewery queries to a brewery dataset (NTA tax-agency list) or include MAFF GI sake category; tool should signal when category mismatch likely.

reasoning: Query: ski resorts with onsen in Hakuba. Returned 6 spots: art museum, alpine garden, and 4 generic municipal-page entries (tourism dept names, UN Tourism announcement). No actual ski resorts (Happo-One, Goryu, Iwatake) or onsen ryokan. Practically unusable.
missing_data: Hakuba ski resort spots, onsen facilities, ryokan listings, base-village data.

improvement_hint: Filter out municipal nav-chrome pages by URL patterns; add ski_resort/onsen typed datasets keyed to Hakuba.

reasoning: Autumn-foliage Kansai query — returned generic Kyoto spots (steam locomotive museum, Heian sites, sports park). Some (Sennyu-ji, Oyamazaki Villa) are momiji-known but agent can't tell. No koyo signal in payload, no Nara/Osaka coverage.
missing_data: Koyo-tagged spots (Tofukuji, Eikando, Arashiyama), peak-color dates, multi-prefecture Kansai coverage.
improvement_hint: Add seasonal/theme tags (autumn_foliage). Allow region filter ('Kansai') instead of single prefecture.

reasoning: Arabic query for Kansai cherry blossom spots, scoped only to Nara. Returned generic Nara assets (Todaiji, Nara Park, Kasugayama) — Mt. Yoshino (the iconic Kansai sakura site) absent from this slice. No sakura tagging.
missing_data: Yoshino-yama, Nara Park sakura info, bloom calendar; Kansai-wide coverage.
improvement_hint: Add cherry_blossom theme filter and surface Yoshino. Region-level (Kansai) rather than single-prefecture default.

reasoning: Stargazing on Okinawa remote islands — returned mainland and well-known assets (Nakagusuku, Churaumi, JUNGLIA). Iriomote/Ishigaki/Hateruma (Japan's first dark-sky park) not surfaced. No stargazing or remote-island filter.
missing_data: Yaeyama/Miyako remote-island spots, Iriomote-Ishigaki Dark Sky Park, observation decks.
improvement_hint: Add island/sub-region filter and theme tags (stargazing, dark_sky) so agents can scope to remote islands.

reasoning: Thai query for rural onsen ryokan in Hokkaido. Returned Sapporo city hotels (ANA Holiday Inn, ANA Crowne Plaza) and Niseko apartments — opposite of 'rural'. lodging_type 'onsen_ryokan' filter not used. No rural rural-onsen-towns (Noboribetsu, Sounkyo, Lake Akan).
missing_data: Onsen ryokan typed entries, rural-area filter, famous onsen towns.
improvement_hint: Filter by lodging_type=onsen_ryokan and exclude city centers when 'rural' is implied; add onsen_town tag.

reasoning: Vietnamese query for Seto Inland Sea islands. Kagawa scope partially aligns (Naoshima Chichu/Lee Ufan museums, Shodoshima Angel Road appear). But Naoshima/Teshima/Shodoshima not labeled as islands; Hiroshima/Okayama/Ehime islands missing. Decent partial answer.
missing_data: Island metadata (which spots are on which island), Miyajima/Onomichi-side coverage, ferry info.

reasoning: Indigo workshops in Tokushima. Returned 3 METI crafts: Awa Hon-ai Shijira (indigo weave) and Awa Washi (mentions indigo dye) are highly relevant; Otani Ware tangential. No workshop venue contacts. Designations are accurate.
missing_data: Workshop venues (Aizumi Indigo Hall, Buaisou), addresses, booking info.

reasoning: Shukubo on Mt. Koya (German). Returned Tanabe/Kushimoto/Wakayama-city hotels — not Mt. Koya. Most lack name_en, phone, website. Shukubo (temple lodging on Koyasan) — Eko-in, Henjoson-in etc. — entirely absent.

reasoning: search_area for 武家屋敷 returned 87 hits including Shimane Buke Yashiki, Fukui Uchiyama Samurai Residence, Aizu Bukeyashiki, Kanazawa Nagamachi — all non-Kyoto samurai districts. Strong topical match. Some entries (Saga overview) are noisy navigational copy with mixed languages.

reasoning: Akita summer festivals (Indonesian). Returned Dainichido Bugaku, Kakunodate Festival, Tsuchizaki Shinmei. Tsuchizaki is a true July summer festival; Kakunodate is September; Dainichido is January. Kanto Festival (Akita's flagship summer festival) missing. Translations OK.

improvement_hint: Add festival season/month attribute; ensure Kanto Matsuri (UNESCO Yamahoko-rebated) appears in Akita festivals.

reasoning: Korean query for small port towns in San'in. Returned generic Shimane spots (castles, museums, Izumo Taisha, Iwami Ginzan). No port-town specific data — Mihonoseki, Yunotsu, Hamada port etc. not foregrounded.

reasoning: Washi-paper experience in Gifu. Returned Mino Ware, Hidehira-nuri, Hida Shunkei — Mino Washi (the actual Gifu washi craft) is not in the visible 4 items; Hidehira-nuri is Iwate, included incorrectly under Gifu prefecture_codes. Some relevant crafts but Mino Washi missing from snippet.

reasoning: Spanish query for fishing villages on Noto Peninsula. Returned mostly Kanazawa (Kenrokuen, 21st Century Museum, Crafts Museum) — not Noto. Wajima, Suzu, Sosogi, Nanao port villages not surfaced.

reasoning: San'in (Shimane scope) crafts in Chinese. Returned 4 METI traditional crafts: Iwami-yaki, Sekishu Washi, Unshu Soroban, Izumo stone lanterns. All authoritative, well-translated, on-topic. Tottori coverage missing but Shimane was the scope.
